text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash and I receive wreaths from her
parents in celebration of her debut.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We talk about the wreaths, and I learn why she
respects her parents so much and how important
doing things the "right way" is to her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her fixation on the Japanese Derby comes from a
desire to please her mother, which is a
surprisingly straightforward reason for her
rigorous work ethic.
